productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Navy Blue Shoes
description: Style NoteClassic driving shoe with a sleek, constructed silhouette from U.S. Polo Association. These slip ons are designed for comfort but the styling on the upper makes it a love-forever classic. You'll love how this shoe adds a natty edge to your outfit and is as comfortable as your bathroom slippers (we're not kidding). The contrast stitch detail is the only design detail added and it only enhances the look of the shoe. Product DetailsNavy blue and brown mid top boat shoe with slip- on styling, overlays and stitched detailing at the seams of the toe boxReinforced overlay with perforations on the heel counterPadded tongue and innerTPU outsole with square shaped nubsMaterial and CareLeather, fabricWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
